semantic.role: Test suite for the SpineWriterBoundary class and withProtectedOutputsWriteAccess function, using vitest to validate write protection behavior against the local filesystem.
responsibilities: Set up temporary directory structures with files of varying permissions to simulate protected and unprotected outputs.
Invoke SpineWriterBoundary or withProtectedOutputsWriteAccess under test conditions and assert their behavior (e.g., write success, write denial, error propagation).
Clean up temporary test directories after each test to maintain isolation between test runs.
outOfScope: Production implementation of the writer boundary logic.
Integration with cloud or remote storage systems; tests are confined to local filesystem operations.
invariants: The test file name must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts according to project conventions (rule: test-file-suffix). (Violation not assessable without filename.)
Tests must not modify files outside the temporary directory created for each test.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated regression tests for the write protection boundary, guaranteeing that protected outputs cannot be written by unauthorized code and that the boundary behaves correctly under various permission scenarios.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial commit — added this test suite as part of the project bootstrap to verify the writer boundary module from the start.
